originalTitle: Zambia's government takes possession of ex-president's body in repatriation row
title: Zambia's government takes possession of ex-president's body in repatriation row
content: Zambia authorities and Edgar Lungu's family are in a dispute over where former leader's remains should be buried.

title: This man was jailed for five years over Nigeria's End Sars protests and then freed without trial
content: At 17, Rasheed Wasiu was detained as security forces cracked down on protests against police brutality.

title: Pope Leo criticises Equatorial Guinea prisons as he winds up Africa tour
content: The Pope gives a frank and passionate speech, the likes of which have characterised his tour of Africa.

originalTitle: Gaza’s second front: The battle against disease-carrying rats
title: Gaza’s second front: The battle against disease-carrying rats
content: Palestinian families in Gaza endure daily terror from rats in unsanitary camps, but help is hard to come by.

title: Lamine Yamal’s World Cup status unclear after Barcelona injury
content: Lamine Yamal pulled up injured when scoring the winning goal for Barcelona in their La Liga win against Celta Vigo.

title: Thunder cruise past Suns again but lose Jalen Williams
content: Shai Gilgeous-Alexander scores 37 as Oklahoma City beat Phoenix Suns 120–107 in the Western Conference playoff series.

title: Two trains collide head-on in Denmark, leaving five critically hurt
content: The accident happened early on Thursday at a level crossing north of Copenhagen.

title: Lebanon accuses Israel of targeting journalist killed in air strike
content: Lebanon's prime minister accused Israel of war crimes after IDF attacks on Red Cross vehicles also stopped rescuers from reaching the site.

title: US Navy chief leaving post 'effective immediately', Pentagon says
content: Reports say Phelan, whose role was largely administrative, left amid tension over US shipbuilding.

content: Liam Rosenior lasted just 106 days at Chelsea. So what went wrong? And how did it go wrong so quickly?

title: Two down, one to go - who will join Burnley & Wolves?
